creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #2)

Interesting.
If each port can state minimum requiments (default: unlimited to ease porting small ones) for TMPDIR etc, Mk/bsd.port.mk would be able to check if there's enough space and stop without actual extracting and later processes started.

If setting some limited default, we would need considering local builds on small embedded computers.
